name: Founder OS - Website Form Intake

meta.description: Normalize website lead submissions into prospects and outreach activity.

steps: Validate payload shape from website lead source.
Insert or update prospects with source=website_form and stage=identified.
Insert outreach_activity with activity_type=identified and channel=website.
guardrails: Do not replace existing website form pipeline.
Use idempotent matching on email to avoid duplicates.
